title: ASR Outdoor .22 Caliber Gun Cleaning Kit Brushes Canvas Pouch 10 Piece Set
description:

With the ASR Outdoor 10 Piece .22 Cal Gun Cleaning Kit, you can ensure that your firearms are clean, polished, rust-free and dependable. This set comes with 10 gun cleaning tools to keep your .22 caliber firearms in top shape. Inside the kit, you'll find three 7.5" rifle rod extenders, a patch slot holder, a rod extender with handle, a brass brush, a chamber brush, a double-ended nylon brush, and a plastic bottle for lubricant (lubricant not included.) The nylon and brass brushes will help remove rust, paint and other debris from your firearms

ASR Outdoor .22 Caliber Gun Cleaning Kit Brushes Canvas Pouch 10 Piece Set

Every responsible firearm owner knows the importance of keeping your weapons clean. With the ASR Outdoor 10 Piece .22 Cal Gun Cleaning Kit, you can ensure that your firearms are clean, polished, rust-free and dependable.

Key Features

  • .22 CALIBER GUN CLEANING KIT - Comes with Everything You Need to Clean .22 Cal Firearms - 10 Pieces
  • RIFLE ROD EXTENDERS - (3) 7.5" Rod Extenders, Extender with Handle and Patch Slot Holder for Cleaning Rifles
  • NYLON, BRASS, AND CHAMBER BRUSHES - Removes Rust, Paint, Residue and More from Your Firearm | Regular Cleaning Helps Ensure Weapon is Functioning Properly for Reliable Use
  • PLASTIC OIL BOTTLE - Small Plastic Bottle for Lubricant (Lubricant Not Included) | Essential for Maintaining Firearms
  • OD GREEN CANVAS POUCH - All Accessories Fit Neatly Inside 10" Length Carry Pouch | Snap Closure to Keep Supplies Organized

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROCLK10
  • UPC: 855569007263
  • Color: Black
  • Size: .22 Caliber 10 Piece Set

This set comes with 10 gun cleaning tools to keep your .22 caliber firearms in top shape. Inside the kit, you'll find three 7.5" rifle rod extenders, a patch slot holder, a rod extender with handle, a brass brush, a chamber brush, a double-ended nylon brush, and a plastic bottle for lubricant (lubricant not included.) The nylon and brass brushes will help remove rust, paint and other debris from your firearms.

All of the accessories included fit neatly inside of a sturdy OD green canvas pouch, so you can easily bring your cleaning kit with you or add it to your range bag. The pouch even comes with a belt loop so you can wear it, and it has durable metal snap closures to keep supplies organized during transit.

In addition to cleaning, polishing, removing rust or removing paint from your firearms, these cleaning tools are also great for hobbies, crafting and automotive hardware purposes. Make sure to keep this cleaning kit on hand before your next hunting trip, range session or hobby project!
